message:
test(frankenterm-core): add complex interaction conformance fixtures

Add 9 more conformance fixtures covering complex interactions:

- cursor/cnl_cpl_combined: CNL+CPL navigation with col 0 reset
- cursor/vpa_cha_combo: VPA+CHA absolute row/col positioning
- erase/ed_erase_all_then_print: ED(2) clears display, print on clean grid
- esc_sequences/index_at_region_bottom: Index scrolls up within region
- line_edit/delete_chars_mid_row: DCH shifts content left
- line_edit/insert_chars_at_end: ICH at last column pushes content off edge
- modes/decom_vpa_in_region: VPA with DECOM addresses region-relative rows
- scroll_region/scroll_region_reset: CSI r with no params resets to full screen
- tab_stops/back_tab_at_origin: CBT at col 0 stays at col 0

Total conformance fixtures: ~113

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "ed_erase_all_then_print",
+  "description": "ED mode 2 erases entire display; subsequent print appears on cleared grid",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41424344451b5b323b3148464748494a1b5b324a1b5b313b33485859",
+  "comment": "Fill row 0 with ABCDE, row 1 with FGHIJ; ED(2) clears everything; CUP(1,3) → (0,2); print XY at (0,2-3); cursor at (0,4)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 4 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "X" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "Y" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 4, "char": " " }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "delete_chars_mid_row",
+  "description": "DCH in middle of row shifts remaining content left, blanks at end",
+  "initial_size": [5, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41424344451b5b313b32481b5b3250",
+  "comment": "Print ABCDE; CUP(1,2) → (0,1); DCH(2) deletes B,C; D,E shift left to cols 1-2; blanks at cols 3-4; cursor at (0,1)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 1 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": " " }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "insert_chars_at_end",
+  "description": "ICH at last column pushes content off the right edge",
+  "initial_size": [5, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41424344451b5b313b35481b5b3240",
+  "comment": "Print ABCDE fills row 0; CUP(1,5) → (0,4); ICH(2) inserts 2 blanks at col 4, E pushed off; row: ABCD then blank at col 4; cursor at (0,4)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 4 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": " " }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+{
+  "name": "scroll_region_reset",
+  "description": "CSI r with no params resets scroll region to full screen",
+  "initial_size": [5, 5],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b5b323b33721b5b323b314841421b5b333b314843441b5b721b5b484546",
+  "comment": "Set region rows 2-3 (0-indexed 1-2); CUP(2,1) → (1,0), print AB; CUP(3,1) → (2,0), print CD; CSI r reset to full screen; CUP home; print EF at (0,0-1); cursor at (0,2)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 2 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "F" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 1, "char": "D" }
+    ]
+  }
+}
